signals.headline: Kevin Warsh Appointed New Fed Chair Amid Surging Inflation and Rate Hike Speculation** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1
signals.raw:
Kevin Warsh Appointed New Fed Chair Amid Surging Inflation and Rate Hike Speculation** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][4]

Kevin Warsh's appointment as Federal Reserve chair—confirmed in recent reports—marks a major shift, with his first potential action being a rate hike as annual core inflation hits 3.9% (pre-oil shock) and derivatives markets price a ~20% chance of a hike by December 2026[1]
matched_markets: Kevin Warsh confirmed as Fed Chair by May 15?
